reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://www.gq.com/story/best-white-sneakers and extract every white sneaker they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, material (leather/canvas/suede), style notes, comfort details, pros with specifics, cons.

Go to https://www.esquire.com/style/mens-fashion/g1885/10-white-sneakers-to-wear-right-now-071514/ and extract every white sneaker they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, material, style notes, comfort, pros with specifics, cons.

Go to https://www.instyle.com/fashion/best-white-sneakers and extract every white sneaker they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, material, comfort notes, style notes, pros with specifics, cons.

Go to https://www.thequalityedit.com/articles/best-white-sneakers-on-the-internet and extract every white sneaker they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, material, construction quality notes, comfort, pros with specifics, cons.
